summary: Implemented WebSocket handler with connection lifecycle, notification pusher that streams to connected clients, and token-bucket rate limiter (100/min per user). Tests cover normal delivery, rate limit enforcement, and reconnection with exponential backoff.

self_assessment.recommendation: Monitor rate limiter memory under sustained load; consider bounded cache eviction

risk_notes: Rate limiter uses in-memory map per user; thread safety verified for single-process Node.js event loop. For multi-instance deployment, consider Redis-backed limiter.
